name: JAIS
body:
### Coming Soon
- Refactoring to minimize external dependencies (particularly as they relate to licensing deviations from Apache 2)
- Full NMEA 0183 4.10 spec implementation
- Message encoding for the creation of NMEA 0183 compliant messages

### Authors and Contributors
Jonathan Machen (@vermicious and @jmachen)
